commands.review_summary:
This PR adds the runtime-policy peer-scoped session key to auto-reply `/new` browser-tab cleanup and adds direct-DM regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +45. Total +59 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source shows cleanup omits the peer-scoped runtime-policy key while the browser registry closes only supplied session keys, and the PR body includes a real Chromium/CDP proof of the failure and fix path.
